title: A Decisive Matchup in the Onigashima Raid
description: On pages 15–18, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Franky, Unknown person #15, Unknown person #16, Yamato as The raid becomes a series of decisive matchups while Luffy challenges Kaido and the Straw Hats protect their allies.
scene: The Onigashima raid breaks into decisive one-on-one and group battles as Luffy, Yamato, Momonosuke, and the Straw Hats push against Kaido’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Cough!! Everyone fears the beast pirates because of the flying six!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I'm taking you down with me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You'll make for a worthy addition to our military strength.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is that any way for a father to talk to his child?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I went through a lot to get that devil fruit...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did you really think I'd just let you use its power freely?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I only ate it 'cause I was hungry!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All I wanted was to set sail and now I can't even swim...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've tried to kill you countless times now,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And you always knocked me down, but that's what made me strong!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your shackles weren't the only thing keeping me here!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 25 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
